_comment: Manifest for ingest/build_education_extra.py. It ingests USER-PROVIDED reference material into corpus/education/ as normalized markdown so the RAG chunker can pick it up. Add your own local files under 'local_files'. Each entry: 'path' = absolute or repo-relative path to a .pdf/.md/.txt file you already have a right to use; 'slug' = optional output filename stem (defaults to a sanitized version of the source name); 'title' = optional H1 title for the note. URLs are DISABLED by default and only used with the explicit --allow-network flag; only add URLs you are permitted to fetch under their Terms of Service. Do NOT add scraped or copyrighted third-party content.

_example_url.title: Investor Glossary
_example_url.license_note: Confirmed permitted for reuse under source ToS
